api_errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to resend invitations.
api_errors.email_missing: The collaborator does not have an email configured.
api_errors.password_already_set: The collaborator already has a password configured.

dialogs.delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete collaborator "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated assignments.
dialogs.delete_error_msg: Error deleting collaborator. Make sure they have no associated assignments.
dialogs.deactivate_msg: Deactivate "{{name}}". Optional: provide a reason (resignation, role change, leave).

api_errors.delete_forbidden: You do not have permission to delete this collaborator.
api_errors.deactivate_forbidden: You do not have permission to deactivate this collaborator.

empty.no_data_subtitle: Start by adding your first collaborator to the system

form.external_keys_hint_global: Names or aliases this person uses in your external systems (Jira, Google Sheets, etc.). Used as a wildcard when no connector-specific alias exists.
form.external_keys_hint_specific: Names or identifiers for this person in {{source}}. Comma-separated. E.g.: johana, j.garcia
form.manager_warning: This manager belongs to a unit that reports to this collaborator's area. Verify if this is correct.
form.person_scope_hint: If this person has a "Person" node in the organizational structure, link it here so they appear in the org chart.

errors.email_duplicate: A collaborator with this email already exists
errors.circular_manager: This manager creates a circular relationship in the hierarchy

api_errors.scope_not_found: The selected area or scope no longer exists.
api_errors.create_forbidden: You do not have permission to create collaborators in that area.
api_errors.update_forbidden: You do not have permission to edit this collaborator.
